schema_notes: schema_version=1. One record per gem (joined view): Gems.lua metadata + matched Skills/*.lua granted_effect.
granted_effect MAY be null when grantedEffectId is missing or doesn't appear in any Skills file (e.g. UI-only gems, legacy entries).
Per-level data extracts: crit_chance, level_requirement, cost ({type, value} for the first cost type only), cooldown, pvp_damage_multiplier.

stat_sets v1 extracts: index, label, base_effectiveness, incremental_effectiveness, damage_incremental_effectiveness. The full statMap / baseFlags / constantStats / stats lists are NOT extracted in v1 — they need structural Lua parsing.
additional_stat_sets is a list of effect_id strings referenced from Gems.lua; consumers can look those up in Skills/*.lua separately.
Snake_case keys throughout, matching other data/game/ datasets.
data_policy: Extracted from the upstream PathOfBuilding-PoE2 community repo (open-source). No third-party wiki / scraped data.
